misc: Has planted his seeds in four different women in four different decades.
biography: Mikko, a dedicated representative from Lakeside Golf Vammala, has cultivated an enduring presence within the esteemed Hector Trophée. His consistent participation has etched his name deeply into the tournament's history, as he has graced its demanding fairways on eleven separate occasions, demonstrating a remarkable commitment to this unique pairs competition.

Despite his extensive involvement, the ultimate triumph of securing the coveted Hector Trophée alongside a partner, or indeed the individual Victor Trophy, has, as yet, remained a goal unfulfilled for Mikko. His numerous campaigns are characterized by a persistent and determined engagement, underscoring a relentless pursuit of competitive mastery that continues to fuel his ambition.

Beyond the competitive arena, Mikko's life journey is equally compelling, notable for its profound impact across different epochs. His personal narrative is distinguished by a singular breadth of experience, particularly in the realm of family, where he has notably contributed to the continuation of lineage by having fathered children with four different women across four distinct decades 1a testament to a life lived with enduring vitality and diverse contributions beyond the links. This unique aspect of his life underscores a remarkable longevity and a multifaceted existence that extends far beyond the confines of the golf course.

While Mikko will regrettably not be among the competitors for the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, marking a temporary pause in his storied involvement, his status as still active in Hector events signals an anticipated return. The golfing community will undoubtedly await the moment this seasoned campaigner once again joins the fray, eager to witness the continued unfolding of his dedicated pursuit for championship glory.
